name: Appointments: Create Request

description.en: Create an appointment request when an appointment cannot be booked natively.
description.de: Erstellt eine Terminanfrage, wenn ein Termin nicht direkt gebucht werden kann.
description.fr: Creez une demande de rendez-vous lorsqu un rendez-vous ne peut pas etre reserve directement.
description.es: Crea una solicitud de cita cuando la reserva no pueda completarse de forma directa.
description.ro: Creeaza o cerere de programare atunci cand rezervarea nu poate fi facuta direct.
description.it: Create an appointment request when an appointment cannot be booked natively.

bot: Use this when booking cannot be completed because there is no connected calendar, no suitable slots were found, or the user wants manual follow-up. Create a clear appointment request with the requester, preferred start time, duration, timezone, failure reason, and notes.

inputs.name: Title

description.fr: Titre de la demande de rendez-vous
description.es: Titulo de la solicitud de cita

inputs.bot: Use a title like 'Appointment request: Intro Call'.

inputs.name: Service Slug

description.de: Optionaler Bezeichner fuer einen konfigurierten Service
description.fr: Identifiant facultatif d un service configure
description.es: Identificador opcional de un servicio configurado
description.ro: Identificator optional pentru un serviciu configurat

inputs.bot: If the request belongs to a configured service, pass the service slug.

inputs.name: Requester Name
inputs.bot: Name of the requester if known.

inputs.name: Requester Email
inputs.bot: Email address of the requester if known.

inputs.name: Window Start

description.en: Preferred scheduling window start in ISO format
description.de: Beginn des bevorzugten Zeitfensters im ISO-Format
description.fr: Debut souhaite du creneau au format ISO
description.es: Inicio preferido de la franja horaria en formato ISO
description.ro: Inceputul preferat al intervalului in format ISO
description.it: Preferred scheduling window start in ISO format

inputs.bot: Earliest preferred time in ISO 8601 format.

inputs.name: Timezone

description.es: Zona horaria de la persona solicitante

inputs.bot: Timezone identifier such as Europe/Vienna or America/New_York.

inputs.name: Failure Reason

description.en: Why direct booking could not complete
description.de: Warum die direkte Buchung nicht abgeschlossen werden konnte
description.fr: Pourquoi la reservation directe n a pas pu aboutir
description.es: Por que no se pudo completar la reserva directa
description.ro: De ce nu s-a putut finaliza rezervarea directa
description.it: Why direct booking could not complete

inputs.bot: Use a compact machine-readable reason like no_calendar_integration, no_suitable_slots, or stale_slot.

inputs.name: Notes
inputs.bot: Optional notes or context for manual follow-up.

description.en: We'll get back to you at these details.
description.de: Wir melden uns unter diesen Angaben bei dir.
description.fr: Nous reviendrons vers vous avec ces coordonnees.
description.ro: Vom reveni catre tine folosind aceste date.
description.it: We'll get back to you at these details.

description.en: Give us a rough idea of your availability.
description.de: Gib uns eine ungefähre Vorstellung deiner Verfügbarkeit.
description.fr: Donnez-nous une idee generale de vos disponibilites.
description.es: Danos una idea general de tu disponibilidad.
description.ro: Da-ne o idee generala despre disponibilitatea ta.
description.it: Give us a rough idea of your availability.

description.en: A few words help us prepare for the meeting.
description.de: Ein paar Worte helfen uns, das Treffen vorzubereiten.
description.fr: Quelques mots nous aideront a preparer le rendez-vous.
description.es: Unas palabras nos ayudaran a preparar la cita.
description.ro: Cateva cuvinte ne ajuta sa pregatim programarea.
description.it: A few words help us prepare for the meeting.

success.fr: Demande de rendez-vous enregistree pour suivi.
success.es: Solicitud de cita registrada para seguimiento.
success.ro: Cererea de programare a fost inregistrata pentru urmarire.
